get.description:
List all courses (slug-ordered). The SPA course picker needs to
enumerate courses; per V-D1 that read extends the public API rather
than a dashboard-private route.

schema.title: Response List Courses Api V1 Courses Get
Response Create Course Api V1 Courses Post

post.description:
V-O2: validate-then-materialize, atomic. The body matches the §I shape:

    { "course": {"slug","name","description?"},
      "nodes": [ {"path":[...], "kind", "name", "position?"}, ... ] }

The validator surfaces every problem in one 422 (whole-upload rejection).
On success, the materializer wipes any existing outline for the course
and inserts the new tree in one transaction (V-O3: re-upload restores).

post.description: Trigger a one-off Anki deck sync against the configured deck.

schema.title: Response Sync Anki Api V1 Anki Sync Post
Response Get Review Queue Api V1 Anki Review Queue Get
Response Get Cards For Qid Api V1 Anki Cards By Qid  Qid  Get
Response List Assignments Route Api V1 Anki Assignments Get
Response List Reviews Route Api V1 Anki Reviews Get

AnkiAssignmentCreateIn.title: AnkiAssignmentCreateIn
AnkiAssignmentCreateIn.description:
V52 create-assignment payload. `scope_value` is a topic_id (as str)
or a CC code, matched by `scope_kind`.

AnkiAssignmentPatchIn.title: AnkiAssignmentPatchIn
AnkiAssignmentPatchIn.description:
V51 transition payload — only the two human-driven transitions
(skipped, completed) live on this endpoint. unlock + auto-complete
live on their respective scheduler jobs (T63, T64).

AnkiLoadAdherenceOut.title: AnkiLoadAdherenceOut
AnkiLoadAdherenceOut.description:
V54 deterministic adherence shape. ⊥ a `recommended_changes`
field per V60 — advisory lives in the MCP host chat. `reviewed_series`
(T43) is the actual per-day reviewed count over `window_days` — data,
not advisory.

AnkiLoadConfigIn.title: AnkiLoadConfigIn
AnkiLoadConfigIn.description:
V59 singleton upsert. Both budgets must be positive (mirrors the
DB CHECK constraints + lets Pydantic short-circuit at the API layer
instead of bouncing through an IntegrityError).

AnkiReviewCreateIn.title: AnkiReviewCreateIn
AnkiReviewCreateIn.description:
V53 amended create-review payload. Reviews are standalone — no
FK to assignments; deck name derived from the new row's own PK.
`card_ids` carry AnKing-native ids (BIGINT) so AnkiConnect's
filtered-deck `cid:<csv>` query receives them verbatim.

AnkiReviewQueueCardOut.title: AnkiReviewQueueCardOut
AnkiReviewQueueCardOut.description:
Review-queue card (§T42 base shape) + per-card review metrics (T43).

`retention` = lifetime true-retention (pass/total over non-learn reviews);
`retrievability` = forgetting-curve recall estimate. Both None when the
card has no qualifying reviews / no scheduled interval. Data-only (V13).

DiscriminatorIn.title: DiscriminatorIn
DiscriminatorIn.description:
Persist-only write payload (V-M1): data fields only, no verdict /
grade / heuristic. The host reasons; this seam persists.

ReviewedDayOut.title: ReviewedDayOut
ReviewedDayOut.description: One point of the T43 reviewed-count series.
